features.responsiveness: Implemented fully across Sidebar, TopNav, SettingsPage, and LandingPage. Replaced fixed layouts with mobile-first Tailwind grids and slide-down navigation drawer overlay.
features.user_authentication: Integrated @clerk/clerk-react with multi-modal AuthProvider (Clerk live mode + offline mock mode). Protected internal dashboard routes using ProtectedRoute, dynamic User Menu settings syncing, and Google SSO mock log-ins.
features.localization: Multilingual i18next support added for English, Hindi, Tamil, Arabic (with RTL), and Spanish, complete with language selector component in header.
features.hosting_configuration: vercel.json added to handle client-side SPA routing rewrites.
